0x80000A74:dword:0x39600000
# Replace C with L
0x80000A78:dword:0x700C2000
0x80000A7C:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000A80:dword:0x41820008
0x80000A84:dword:0x616B4000
# Replace B with R
0x80000A88:dword:0x700C0200
0x80000A8C:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000A90:dword:0x41820008
0x80000A94:dword:0x616B0400
# Replace Z with ZL
0x80000A98:dword:0x700C0080
0x80000A9C:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000AA0:dword:0x41820008
0x80000AA4:dword:0x616B2000
# Replace A with ZR
0x80000AA8:dword:0x700C0004
0x80000AAC:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000AB0:dword:0x41820008
0x80000AB4:dword:0x616B0800
# Replace A with a
0x80000AB8:dword:0x700C0010
0x80000ABC:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000AC0:dword:0x41820008
0x80000AC4:dword:0x616B0800
# Replace B with b
0x80000AC8:dword:0x700C0040
0x80000ACC:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000AD0:dword:0x41820008
0x80000AD4:dword:0x616B0400
# Replace C with y
0x80000AD8:dword:0x700C0020
0x80000ADC:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000AE0:dword:0x41820008
0x80000AE4:dword:0x616B4000
# Replace Wiimote-Shake with x
0x80000AE8:dword:0x700C0008
0x80000AEC:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000AF0:dword:0x41820008
0x80000AF4:dword:0x616B0020
# Replace D-Up with D-Up
0x80000AF8:dword:0x700C0001
0x80000AFC:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000B00:dword:0x41820008
0x80000B04:dword:0x616B0008
# Replace D-Left with D-Left
0x80000B08:dword:0x700C0002
0x80000B0C:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000B10:dword:0x41820008
0x80000B14:dword:0x616B0001
# Replace D-Right with D-Right
0x80000B18:dword:0x700C8000
0x80000B1C:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000B20:dword:0x41820008
0x80000B24:dword:0x616B0002
# Replace D-Down with D-Down
0x80000B28:dword:0x700C4000
0x80000B2C:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000B30:dword:0x41820008
0x80000B34:dword:0x616B0004
# Replace + with +
0x80000B38:dword:0x700C0400
0x80000B3C:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000B40:dword:0x41820008
0x80000B44:dword:0x616B0010
# Replace - with -
0x80000B48:dword:0x700C1000
0x80000B4C:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000B50:dword:0x41820008
0x80000B54:dword:0x616B1000
# Replace HOME with HOME
0x80000B58:dword:0x700C0800
0x80000B5C:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000B60:dword:0x41820008
0x80000B64:dword:0x616B8000
